translations.![切換到「自動化」頁籤，點擊右上角「+」](/assets/21119db77: ![Switch to the "Automation" tab, tap the "+" at the top right](/assets/21119db777dd/1*_LPvWc3F9OKed2q93u2sQA.png)
translations.![找到剛在米家「加入 Siri」設定的「呼叫Siri 時的指令」，選擇](/a: ![Find the "Siri Command" just added in Mi Home's "Add to Siri" settings and select it](/assets/21119db777dd/1*gosnwKrxnR77BX4z9IMTUQ.png)

translations.### iOS ≥ 13.1 使用「捷徑」自動化功能搭配米家智慧家居\n\n: ### iOS ≥ 13.1 Using the "Shortcuts" Automation Feature with Mi Home Smart Devices
translations.#### 1.先打開米家APP\n\n: #### 1. First, open the Mi Home app
translations.**請注意，會要求解鎖手機後才能。**\n\n: **Please note, unlocking the phone is required before proceeding.**
translations.**這邊要注意！** 指令不可以與 iOS 內建指令衝突！\n\n: **Important!** The shortcut must not conflict with any built-in iOS shortcuts!
translations.*1.GPS感應範圍存在 100 公尺誤差*\n\n: *1. GPS sensing range has an error margin of 100 meters*
translations.*2. **所謂「自動化」只是自動通知你按執行** ，不是真的自動在背景執行動作: *2. **"Automation" here only means automatically notifying you to tap and run**, not truly running actions automatically in the background*
translations.*若沒有「自動化」頁籤請確認您的 iOS 版本是否高於 13.1。*\n\n: *If you don't see the "Automation" tab, please make sure your iOS version is above 13.1.*
translations.*這裡假設你已經把設備加入米家了。*\n\n: *This assumes you have already added the devices to Mi Home.*
translations.*這裡再提一下為什麼不直接用米家的「離開或到達某地」，第一是 [大陸用的GPS有: *Here, let's mention again why we don't use Mi Home's "Leave or Arrive at a Location" directly. First, [GPS in Mainland China has offsets](https://buzzorange.com/techorange/2019/05/09/china-map-is-wrong/){:target="_blank"}, and Xiaomi hasn't fixed this. Second, it only allows setting locations with landmarks on the map, but Gaode Map in Mainland China has very few landmarks in Taiwan.*
translations.*離智能生活又更近一步了！*\n\n: *One step closer to a smart lifestyle!*
translations.1. [Smart Home First Experience — Apple:
1. [Smart Home First Experience — Apple HomeKit & Xiaomi Mijia (Mijia Smart Camera and Mijia Smart Desk Lamp, HomeKit Setup Guide)](../c3150cdc85dd/)

2. [Xiaomi Smart Home New Purchases (AI Speaker, Temperature and Humidity Sensor, Scale 2, DC Inverter Fan)](../bcff7c157941/)

3. [Mi Home APP / Xiao Ai Speaker Region Issue](../94a4020edb82/)

4. [**[Advanced] Demonstration of Using Raspberry Pi as a HomeBridge Server to Connect All Mi Home Appliances to HomeKit**](../99db2a1fbfe5/)
translations.> *1. GPS sensing range has an error mar: > *1. GPS sensing range has an error margin of 100 meters*
translations.> *2. **\"Automation\" here only means a: > *2. **"Automation" here only means automatically notifying you to tap and run**, not truly running actions automatically in the background*
translations.> *Here, let's mention again why we don': > *Here, let's mention again why we don't use Mi Home's "Leave or Arrive at a Location" directly. First, [GPS in Mainland China has offsets](https://buzzorange.com/techorange/2019/05/09/china-map-is-wrong/){:target="_blank"}, and Xiaomi hasn't fixed this. Second, it only allows setting locations with landmarks on the map, but Gaode Map in Mainland China has very few landmarks in Taiwan.*
translations.> *If you don't see the \"Automation\" t: > *If you don't see the "Automation" tab, please make sure your iOS version is above 13.1.*
translations.> *One step closer to a smart lifestyle!: > *One step closer to a smart lifestyle!*
translations.> *This assumes you have already added t: > *This assumes you have already added the devices to Mi Home.*
translations.> [*To solve the above two issues, you c: > [*To solve the above two issues, you can only use what was mentioned at the beginning of the article: buy a HomePod or find an Apple TV/iPad to act as a home hub.*](../c3150cdc85dd/)
translations.> [p.s If you have a HomePod, Apple TV,: > [p.s If you have a HomePod, Apple TV, or iPad, you don’t need to read this article; just set up the device as a home hub!] (../c3150cdc85dd/)
translations.[**[進階篇]示範使用樹莓派當 HomeBridge 主機，將所有米家家電串上: [**[Advanced] Demonstration of Using Raspberry Pi as a HomeBridge Server to Connect All Mi Home Appliances to HomeKit**](../99db2a1fbfe5/)
translations.[*以上兩個痛點要解決就只能用文章開頭所說的，買一台HomePod或是找一台 a: [*To solve the above two issues, you can only use what was mentioned at the beginning of the article: buy a HomePod or find an Apple TV/iPad to act as a home hub.*](../c3150cdc85dd/)
translations.[p.s 如果你有HomePod、apple tv、iPad 完全不用看這篇文章: [p.s If you have a HomePod, Apple TV, or iPad, you don’t need to read this article; just set up the device as a home hub!] (../c3150cdc85dd/)
[Xiaomi Smart Home New Purchases (AI Speaker, Temperature and Humidity Sensor, Scale 2, DC Inverter Fan)](../bcff7c157941/)
translations.[智慧家居初體驗 — Apple HomeKit & 小米米家 （米家智慧攝影機: [Smart Home First Experience — Apple HomeKit & Xiaomi Mijia (Mijia Smart Camera and Mijia Smart Desk Lamp, HomeKit Setup Guide)](../c3150cdc85dd/)
translations.[米家 APP / 小愛音箱地區問題](../94a4020edb82/)\n: [Mi Home APP / Xiao Ai Speaker Region Issue](../94a4020edb82/)
translations.下拉「智慧裝置」區塊，新增要操作的裝置及動作\n\n: Scroll down to the "Smart Devices" section, and add the devices and actions you want to control.
translations.下方可設定自動執行時間範圍，點右上角「下一步」\n\n: Below, you can set the time range for automatic execution. Tap "Next" at the top right corner.
translations.不同於 IFTTT 原生內建 APP 的強大就在於它手錶上的通知也能執行。\n(:
Unlike the native IFTTT app, its strength lies in the ability to execute actions directly from the watch notifications.  
(IFTTT notifications are purely alerts, requiring you to take out your phone to execute.)
translations.今年 7 月初的時候買了米家檯燈 Pro、米家 LED 智慧檯燈兩個智能設備，差: In early July this year, I bought two smart devices: the Mi Home Desk Lamp Pro and the Mi Home LED Smart Desk Lamp. The difference is that one supports HomeKit, while the other only supports Mi Home. At that time, I wrote an article titled "[Smart Home First Experience — Apple HomeKit & Xiaomi Mi Home](../c3150cdc85dd/)" explaining how to set up smart functions for leaving and arriving home without a HomePod, Apple TV, or iPad. The steps were a bit complicated.
translations.切換到「自動化」頁籤，點擊右上角「+」\n\n: Switch to the "Automation" tab, then tap the "+" icon at the top right corner.
translations.回到列表，點「加入 Siri 」\n\n: Back to the list, tap "Add to Siri"
translations.因為已將米家智慧操作場景加入到 Siri 了，所以也可以呼叫 Siri 執行動作: Since the Mi Home automation scenes have been added to Siri, you can also use Siri to execute the actions!
translations.因為離家、到家是全天候都要偵測的事件；所以這邊就不設會執行的時間範圍了！\n\n: Because leaving and arriving home are events that need to be detected all day long, no time range for execution is set here!
translations.找到剛在米家「加入 Siri」設定的「呼叫Siri 時的指令」，選擇\n\n: Find the "Siri Shortcut" you just added in the Mi Home app and select it.
translations.搜尋位置或使用當前位置，點「完成」\n\n: Search for a location or use the current location, then tap "Done"
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有時候米家設備網路問題會執行失敗。\n\n: Sometimes the Mi Home devices fail to execute due to network issues.
translations.滑到「捷徑」區塊，選擇「執行捷徑」\n\n: Scroll to the "Shortcuts" section and select "Run Shortcut"
translations.當離開、進入設定地址的範圍時，手機、Apple Watch 就會收到執行捷徑的動: When leaving or entering the set address range, your iPhone or Apple Watch will receive a notification to run the shortcut. Tap it to execute!
translations.直接使用 iOS ≥ 13.1 內建的捷徑APP完成自動化操作\n\n: Use the Built-in Shortcuts App in iOS ≥ 13.1 to Complete Automation Tasks Directly
translations.範例以「離家」模式為例，離家時我希望能關閉風扇、燈；打開攝影機。\n\n: The example uses the "Leaving Home" mode. When leaving, I want to turn off the fan and lights, and turn on the camera.
translations.輸入「呼叫Siri 時的指令」-> 「Add to Siri」\n\n: Enter the "Command to call Siri" -> "Add to Siri"
translations.這次 iOS ≥13.1 (注意是 13.1 之後才開放)，內建的「 [捷徑](: This time, iOS ≥13.1 (note that automation is only available from version 13.1 onwards) has built-in support for automation in the [Shortcuts](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/%E6%8D%B7%E5%BE%91/id915249334){:target="_blank"} app (if you can't find it, please download it from the Store). If you used IFTTT or Mi Home before, now you no longer need to rely on third-party apps!
translations.進入、離開設定區域會收到捷徑執行通知，點擊後會自動執行。\n\n: You will receive a notification from Shortcuts when entering or leaving the set area; tapping it will automatically execute the action.
translations.首頁就會出現剛新增的自動化操作囉！\n\n: The newly added automation will appear right on the home page!
translations.點右上角「完成」\n\n: Tap "Done" at the top right corner
translations.點擊「繼續增加」加入所有要操作的設備\n\n: Click "Continue Adding" to include all devices you want to control
translations.點擊右上角「儲存」，輸入此智慧操作的名稱\n\n: Tap the top right corner "Save" and enter the name for this smart action
translations.點擊要加入的智慧操作旁的「加入 Siri 」\n\n: Click "Add to Siri" next to the smart action you want to add.
